title: Indulgent Japanese Sushi Rolls
description: A twist on classic sushi rolls with luxurious ingredients and a delicious egg-based sauce.
instructions: Prepare sushi rice according to package instructions.
Cut smoked salmon into thin slices.
In a small bowl, mix together Unagi sauce and sesame seeds.
In a separate bowl, mix together beaten eggs and a pinch of salt.
Lay a sheet of nori seaweed flat and spread sushi rice onto it.
Place smoked salmon, avocado, and a drizzle of Unagi sauce mixture onto the rice.
Roll the sushi using a bamboo sushi mat.
Slice the roll into 8 equal pieces.
Dip the sushi pieces into the egg sauce and coat evenly.
Garnish with pickled ginger and a sprinkle of sesame seeds.
Serve with caviar on top (if using).
